name: Hideable
summary: Accesses the information if this object is hidden or not or if it should be.

constructors.name: Hideable
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Hideable class

methods.name: HideFromDrawing
methods.summary: Hides this object from the whole drawing. Calling Modify on the object is required to hide the object.

methods.name: HideFromDrawingView
methods.summary: Hides this object from the drawing view. Calling Modify on the object is required to hide the object.

methods.name: ShowInDrawing
methods.summary: Shows this object in the whole drawing. Calling Modify on the object is required to show the object.

methods.name: ShowInDrawingView
methods.summary: Shows this object in the drawing view. Calling Modify on the object is required to show the object.

properties.name: IsHidden
properties.summary: Retrieves the information if this object is hidden or not.
